lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: You stay away from me outerlander!

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: I cannot speak to you outerlander! Talk to Brundt, the Chieftain!

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: You shame us, [Fremennik name]!

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: How can you steal from me, [Fremennik name]?

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: You have betrayed your heritage, [Fremennik name]!

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: Why would you try to steal from me, [Fremennik name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: Hello again [brother/sister] [Fremennik name]. What need you of me this day? You can always rely on my assistance!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing thanks. I just fancied a chat.

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: My door is always open should you ever need my help [Fremennik name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: [Fremennik name]... It has been too long since last we met!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: Welcome back [brother/sister] [Fremennik name]. It is always a pleasure to see you here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: My apologies [brother/sister] [Fremennik name]! I have not time to tarry here with you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's okay, I didn't really want anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: How are you [Fremennik name]? I hope all fares well with you this day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks, how are you?

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: All is well with me also!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: Hello to you, too!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: Hello. Did you want something [Fremennik name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not really.

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: Well... okay then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Pontak
lines.text: Always good to see you [brother/sister] [Fremennik name].
